subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: Live so as to be in peace with all your environment... The more obstacles one has to overcome, the more difficulties one meets successfully... Certainly one may belong to a church... Prayer is communion, aspiration, soul contact with God.
subcodes.subjects: @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @love and unity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
